data_description.api_secret: The API secret for your OPNsense user
data_description.tracker_interfaces: Optional interfaces to track, separated by commas or new lines

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_error.description:
Configuring OPNsense using YAML is being removed but there was an error when trying to import the YAML configuration.

Ensure the YAML configuration is correct and restart Home Assistant to try again or remove the OPNsense YAML configuration from your `configuration.yaml` file and continue to set up the integration manually.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_error.title: The OPNsense YAML configuration import failed
